summary:
Recovery: Poor

Reading: State
Poor
Recovery 59 • Sleep 83 • Strain 38%

Read
Sleep gave the day a cleaner base, but recovery still reads subdued and output has run lighter than usual. The late meal steadied the afternoon, though protein and total energy still look thin for muscle protection, so the evening favors controlled strength over intensity.

Controlled strength, steady arc.
